title: write_verilog generate "always @*" blocks that can't be emulated properly

features.name: reg signal driven by always_at_star without initialization
features.description: Code should include a registered signal declared as reg without initial value, where the signal is assigned inside an always @* block with blocking assignments controlled by a case statement

features.name: fsm state as continuous assign with always_at_star driven register
features.description: Code should include a wire signal assigned via continuous assignment that is used in an always @* sensitivity list which drives a registered signal, creating a situation where the always block may not trigger at simulation time 0

features.name: fsm combinational output using blocking assignment to register
features.description: Code should include an FSM pattern where a register is driven by combinational logic via blocking assignments inside an always @* block, where the register is not initialized and the FSM state never transitions
